title: Trial/Project Primary Keys Configuration
description: Schema for YAML config listing SDTM, ADaM, and metadata primary keys per domain

project_id.description: 4-digit project identifier, optionally followed by letters (e.g., 1234 or 1234mad)

keyVarsArray.description: Primary key variables for this domain

domainKeysMapSDTM.description: Map of SDTM domain name to ordered list of variables forming the primary key

propertyNames.description: SDTM domain names must be a two-letter domain (e.g., DM or dm), SUPPxx (e.g., SUPPAE or suppae), or RELREC/relrec

domainKeysMapADaM.description: Map of ADaM dataset name to ordered list of variables forming the primary key

propertyNames.description: ADaM dataset names must start with AD/ad and be 4–8 characters total (e.g., ADSL/adsl, ADLB/adlb, ADAE/adae, ADTTE/adtte)

domainKeysMapMD.description: Map of metadata dataset name to ordered list of variables forming the primary key

propertyNames.description: Metadata dataset names must start with MD/md and be 4–30 characters total, letters/digits
